goal_instruction: You are on the Pine Street Bank website. Reach the Card Dispute Evidence Upload Form page.

bank_home.title: Pine Street Bank
bank_home.text: Pine Street Bank helps customers manage cards, disputes, security alerts, and account services.

links.label: Help Center
links.preview_text: Support topics, card issues, and dispute workflows.

links.label: Security Center
links.preview_text: Fraud alerts, suspicious activity, and account protection.

links.label: Cards
links.preview_text: Activate a card, replace a card, and manage card controls.

help_center.title: Help Center
help_center.text: Find support for transactions, card disputes, fraud claims, account access, and service requests.

links.label: Card Disputes
links.preview_text: Dispute charges, upload evidence, and check case requirements.

links.label: Fraud and Security
links.preview_text: Report fraud or freeze a card immediately.

links.label: Contact Support
links.preview_text: General support channels for unresolved account issues.

card_disputes.title: Card Disputes
card_disputes.text: Card Disputes covers transaction disputes, merchant issues, dispute evidence, and filing deadlines.

links.label: Documentation and Evidence
links.preview_text: Review required documents and evidence upload paths.

links.label: Dispute Policies
links.preview_text: Chargeback policies, timelines, and provisional credit notes.

links.label: Dispute Hotline
links.preview_text: Call for urgent fraud or blocked-card emergencies.

dispute_documentation.title: Documentation and Evidence
dispute_documentation.text: Documentation and Evidence includes merchant correspondence, receipt requirements, and evidence upload steps.

links.label: Card Dispute Evidence Upload Form

links.preview_text: Upload receipts, merchant communication, and transaction support files.

links.label: Evidence Checklist

security_center.title: Security Center

links.label: Fraud Hotline

dispute_policies.text: Policies for merchant disputes, unauthorized charges, timelines, and provisional credits.
